languages.text: {n}После череды сухих щелчков {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинные духи{/g} пробуждаются от многолетнего сна. В глубине блока памяти нарастает мерное жужжание, а экран инфопластины наливается бледным светом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}После череды сухих щелчков {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинные духи{/g} пробуждаются от многолетнего сна. В глубине блока памяти нарастает мерное жужжание, а экран инфопластины наливается бледным светом.{/n}

languages.text: {n}After a series of dry clicks, the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} awaken from their long slumber. A steady buzzing sound from within the memory module grows louder, and the data-slate screen produces a pale glow.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}После череды сухих щелчков {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинные духи{/g} пробуждаются от многолетнего сна. В глубине блока памяти нарастает мерное жужжание, а экран инфопластины наливается бледным светом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}After a series of dry clicks, the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} awaken from their years of slumber. A steady buzzing sound grows louder inside the memory module, and a pale light fills the data-slate screen.{/n}

{n}After a series of dry clicks, the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} awaken from their years of slumber. A steady buzzing sound grows louder inside the memory module, and a pale light fills the data-slate screen.{/n}

{n}After a series of dry clicks, the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} awaken from their long slumber. A steady buzzing sound from within the memory module grows louder, and the data-slate screen produces a pale glow.{/n}

{n}After a series of dry clicks, the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} awaken from their long slumber. A steady buzzing sound from within the memory module grows louder, and the data-slate screen produces a pale glow.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伴随着一连串干涩的咔嗒声，沉睡已久的{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}苏醒过来。记忆模块内部持续不断的嗡鸣声越来越响，数据板屏幕泛起苍白的微光。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After a series of dry clicks, the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} awaken from their long slumber. A steady buzzing sound from within the memory module grows louder, and the data-slate screen produces a pale glow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伴随着一连串干涩的咔嗒声，沉睡已久的{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}苏醒过来。记忆模块内部持续不断的嗡鸣声越来越响，数据板屏幕泛起苍白的微光。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tras una serie de chasquidos secos, los {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g} despiertan de su largo letargo. El zumbido estable del interior del módulo de memoria se hace más sonoro y la pantalla de la tablilla de datos produce un resplandor pálido.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After a series of dry clicks, the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} awaken from their long slumber. A steady buzzing sound from within the memory module grows louder, and the data-slate screen produces a pale glow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras una serie de chasquidos secos, los {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritus máquina{/g} despiertan de su largo letargo. El zumbido estable del interior del módulo de memoria se hace más sonoro y la pantalla de la tablilla de datos produce un resplandor pálido.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Après une série de cliquetis secs, les {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g} émergent de leur long sommeil. La vibration provenant de l'intérieur du module augmente, et l'écran de la plaque de données s'allume, diffusant un halo pâle.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After a series of dry clicks, the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} awaken from their long slumber. A steady buzzing sound from within the memory module grows louder, and the data-slate screen produces a pale glow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Après une série de cliquetis secs, les {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}esprits de la machine{/g} émergent de leur long sommeil. La vibration provenant de l'intérieur du module augmente, et l'écran de la plaque de données s'allume, diffusant un halo pâle.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bir dizi kuru tıkırtıdan sonra {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhları{/g}, uzun uykularından uyanıyor. Hafıza modülünün içinden kesintisiz bir vızıltı sesi yükseliyor, databela ekranı ise soluk bir parıltı yayıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After a series of dry clicks, the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} awaken from their long slumber. A steady buzzing sound from within the memory module grows louder, and the data-slate screen produces a pale glow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir dizi kuru tıkırtıdan sonra {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhları{/g}, uzun uykularından uyanıyor. Hafıza modülünün içinden kesintisiz bir vızıltı sesi yükseliyor, databela ekranı ise soluk bir parıltı yayıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Mit einem leisen Klicken erwachen die {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeister{/g} aus ihrem langen Schlummer. Das Summen im Inneren des Speichermoduls wird kontinuierlich lauter, und der Bildschirm des Datablocks erwacht zum Leben.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After a series of dry clicks, the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} awaken from their long slumber. A steady buzzing sound from within the memory module grows louder, and the data-slate screen produces a pale glow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einem leisen Klicken erwachen die {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeister{/g} aus ihrem langen Schlummer. Das Summen im Inneren des Speichermoduls wird kontinuierlich lauter, und der Bildschirm des Datablocks erwacht zum Leben.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一連の乾いたクリック音ののち、{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}機械精霊{/g}が長き眠りから目覚める。メモリーモジュールの内部からの安定した唸り音が大きくなり、データスレートの画面が、淡い光を放つ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After a series of dry clicks, the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirits{/g} awaken from their long slumber. A steady buzzing sound from within the memory module grows louder, and the data-slate screen produces a pale glow.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一連の乾いたクリック音ののち、{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}機械精霊{/g}が長き眠りから目覚める。メモリーモジュールの内部からの安定した唸り音が大きくなり、データスレートの画面が、淡い光を放つ。{/n}
